rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALIZER BARTHOLOMEW TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Issue Sanctions For Disobeying A Court Order Compelling Further Answers To Form Interrogatories & Inspection Demands; Points And Auth; Decl. Of Richard A. Canatella & Exhibits; Req. For Judicial Notice Proof Of Service By Mail
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff's challenge pursuant to CCP Section 170.6(a)(2) is denied as untimely as the declaration of counsel was filed on October 12, 2005. Respondent Dennis Bartholomew's motion for sanctions as to petitioner Richard Hennum. Hearing required. (610/BEC)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE ALIZER BARTHOLOMEW TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And For Attorney'S Fees And Expenses; Points And Auth. Declaration Of R.A. Canatella With Exhibits; Proof Of Mail Service
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff's challenge pursuant to CCP Section 170.6(a)(2) is denied as untimely as the declaration of counsel was filed on October 12, 2005. Respondent Dennis Bartholomew's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories as to petitioners Robert Hennum, Susan Hennum, Sharon Hennum-Yore, Chester Gutowski Jr., and Connie Gutowski. Hearing required. (610/BEC)
